summary: Tested Old Gold (OG) feature for bills. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: OG section visible on BillPage after Grand Total with checkbox toggle, brown/amber color scheme (hsl 30 range), photo upload and value input when expanded, OG badge on Admin Dashboard bill cards showing 'OG ₹X' in brown color.
passed_tests: PUT /api/bills/{bill_id}/old-gold - sets old_gold data with enabled=true, value, photo
PUT /api/bills/{bill_id}/old-gold - old_gold.value does NOT affect grand_total
Frontend BillPage: OG section visible after Grand Total (data-testid='og-section')
Frontend BillPage: OG toggle expands/collapses section (data-testid='og-toggle')
Frontend BillPage: OG value input present when expanded (data-testid='og-value-input')
Frontend BillPage: OG save button present (data-testid='og-save-btn')
Frontend BillPage: OG photo upload present (data-testid='og-photo-upload')
Frontend BillPage: Collapsed OG shows brown badge with value when enabled
Frontend AdminDashboard: Bills with OG show brown 'OG ₹X' badge (data-testid='og-badge-{bill.id}')
seed_data_creation: Test bill created with old_gold values (15000, 25000, 22000) during testing. One bill visible on Admin Dashboard with OG ₹15,000 badge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Old Gold (OG) feature fully tested. Key endpoint: PUT /api/bills/{bill_id}/old-gold (sets old_gold data with enabled, photo, value fields). OG value is display-only and does NOT affect grand_total. OG section on BillPage uses brown/amber color scheme (hsl 30 range). When OG is enabled and collapsed, shows brown badge with value. Admin Dashboard shows 'OG ₹X' badge on bill cards. Manager Dashboard also has OG badges on bill cards and in summary dialog (data-testid='summary-og-badge'). OTP delivery is MOCKED - visible via GET /api/admin/pending-otps.

endpoints_tested.notes: Sets old_gold with enabled, photo, value fields

frontend_components.notes: Brown/amber color scheme after Grand Total

business_logic_verified: OG value does NOT affect grand_total calculation
OG can be enabled/disabled via toggle
OG photo can be uploaded and removed

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes visible via GET /api/admin/pending-otps instead of actual SMS delivery
